title: lygistum smithii
intro: Lygistum smithii, also known as joint pine or joint grass, is a perennial plant in the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lygistum smithii include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as providing relief from coughs and colds due to its expectorant properties. Lygistum smithii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in various herbal preparations for its medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
